name: 05-11-rvv-selected-config-vl-artifact-contract
title: rvv-selected-config-vl-artifact-contract
description: Make the selected RVV config and runtime AVL/VL contract explicit and fail-closed at the plugin-owned artifact export boundary for one finite i64-vmul path.
creator: codex
notes: Completed: RVV artifact/export candidates now validate selected vector-shape config and runtime AVL/VL selected-plan metadata before RVV source/object bundle export; no runtime correctness or performance claim added.
